name: dr-katherine-c-pediatrics-site
description: Sitio web estatico de Dr. Katherine C Pediatrics

scripts.up:all: ([ -f whatsapp-backend/.env ] || cp whatsapp-backend/.env.example whatsapp-backend/.env) && docker compose -f docker-compose.api.yml up --build -d && docker compose -f whatsapp-backend/docker-compose.yml -f whatsapp-backend/docker-compose.override.local.yml up --build -d && (docker rm -f dr-katherine-frontend >/dev/null 2>&1 || true) && docker run -d --name dr-katherine-frontend -p 8080:80 -v "$PWD":/usr/share/nginx/html:ro nginx:alpine
scripts.down:all: docker compose -f docker-compose.api.yml down && docker compose -f whatsapp-backend/docker-compose.yml -f whatsapp-backend/docker-compose.override.local.yml down && (docker rm -f dr-katherine-frontend >/dev/null 2>&1 || true)
scripts.logs:all: docker compose -f docker-compose.api.yml logs --tail=120 && docker compose -f whatsapp-backend/docker-compose.yml -f whatsapp-backend/docker-compose.override.local.yml logs --tail=120 && docker logs --tail=120 dr-katherine-frontend
scripts.validate: npm run check:js && npm run check:links && npm run check:content && npm run check:seo && npm run check:domain
